name: r1pro_right_arm_move_to_position
description: Move the right hand TCP to an absolute MuJoCo world pose using Pinocchio IK. Position-only and orientation-constrained motion are both supported; actuator control is available with direct_qpos=false.

parameters.target_x: Absolute target x position in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.target_y: Absolute target y position in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.target_z: Absolute target z position in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.control_frame: Controlled site frame. Use grasp_tool for all grasp-related motion.
parameters.target_quat_wxyz: Optional target orientation as a unit quaternion in wxyz order.
parameters.orientation_weight: Optional orientation weight when solving pose IK.
parameters.orientation_threshold: Optional orientation success threshold in radians.
